settings.hero_sub: Café-quality flavor for every cup — without the fuss.
settings.founder_p1: Syruvia makes café-quality flavored syrups for coffee, sodas, cocktails, desserts and everything in between — real, true-to-source taste you can pour at home in seconds.
settings.founder_p2: From everyday classics like vanilla and caramel to fruit, seasonal and limited-edition flavors, there's something for every cup — including a full sugar-free range with zero sugar and zero calories.
settings.marquee_words: Real flavor,Zero compromise,250+ flavors,Sugar-free options,Made in the USA,Kosher & gluten-free,50+ servings a bottle
settings.card1_body: No high-fructose corn syrup and no artificial dyes — just real, true-to-source taste and clean labels in every single pour.
settings.card2_body: 250+ flavors and counting, including 68 sugar-free options with zero sugar and zero calories — all the taste, none of the guilt.
settings.card3_body: Premium syrups without the premium markup. VIP members pay just $7.99 a bottle — and it's free to join.
settings.legacy_p1: Everything starts with one question: does it taste amazing? We craft our syrups in the USA, keep them kosher and gluten-free, and skip the junk — so you get café-quality flavor you can feel good about.
settings.legacy_p2: Whether it's your morning coffee, a weekend cocktail, or a treat for the kids, Syruvia turns an ordinary drink into something you actually look forward to.
settings.cta_sub: Explore 250+ syrups — from everyday classics to sugar-free favorites.
